x-enumeration-literals.name: Secured Credit Plan
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Credit that requires specific assets pledged as collateral to secure the loan.

Comment:
Examples

Mortgage secured by property

Car loan secured by the vehicle

x-enumeration-literals.name: Unsecured Credit Plan
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Credit that does not require collateral and relies on the borrowers creditworthiness.

Comment:
Examples

Credit cards

Personal loans

x-enumeration-literals.name: Guaranteed Credit Plan
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Credit secured by a third-party guarantee instead of physical assets.

Comment:
Examples

Parent guaranteeing a student loan

Government guaranteeing a small business loan
